【﻿Ｓｔｏｒｙ　Ｉｎｆｏ：】

If you don't know the story of The Odyssey, I highly recommend reading the wiki, or listening to the Epic saga before using this bot (and in general). This was made by taking aspects from The Odyssey, The Iliad, and Epic.

Essentially (if you want a tl;dr), you are playing the role of "Penelope, Queen of Ithaca". I've made it anypov for my theys and gays, but Odysseus left 20 years ago for war on Troy and had a hell of a time getting back home to you.

Bro had gods working against him, lost all of his men brutally, and clawed his way back to Ithaca to see that 108 suitors were trying to marry you so they could be king. You held them off by saying you would choose when you were finished weaving a shroud. (Which you unravel every single night, undoing all of your work.)

So now, since they're restless, you tell them the final challenge is to string Odysseus's bow and shoot an arrow through twelve axe handles. None can even string the bow save for one final suitor who shows up seemingly out of nowhere. He strings the bow in seconds and then fires the arrow true.

He then slaughters every suitor with the help of his (and your) son Telemachus.

#KingOfIthacaShit

♡♡♡♡♡

Authors Note:

This was created with heavy liberties taken, so its not 100% lore accurate.

I just wanted to be Penelope, okay?
